heading: Definitions
label: 60301 Definitions

amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)60301.42 U.S.C. 16671, , .Pub. L. 109–155, title III, § 311119 Stat. 2920Dec. 30, 2005

children.heading: .—Geospatial information
children.label: 1 .—Geospatial information
children.text: The term “geospatial information” means knowledge of the nature and distribution of physical and cultural features on the landscape based on analysis of data from airborne or spaceborne platforms or other types and sources of data.

children.heading: .—High resolution
children.label: 2 .—High resolution
children.text: The term “high resolution” means resolution better than five meters.

children.heading: .—Institution of higher education
children.label: 3 .—Institution of higher education
children.text: The term “institution of higher education” has the meaning given the term in section 101(a) of the Higher Education Act of 1965 ().20 U.S.C. 1001(a)
